concepts_list.name: Omega_domain
concepts_list.justification: Appears as Ω in the definition of the domain. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: It's the fundamental region of interest.

concepts_list.name: d_Omega
concepts_list.justification: Appears as dΩ in integrals, representing an infinitesimal volume element. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for integration.

concepts_list.name: d_Gamma
concepts_list.justification: Appears as dΓ in integrals, representing an infinitesimal boundary element. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for integration.

concepts_list.name: v
concepts_list.description: Test function in the weak formulation
concepts_list.justification: Used as test functions in the variational formulation of the problem. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation in finite element methods.

concepts_list.name: kappa
concepts_list.justification: Defined as the thermal conductivity. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for thermal conductivity.

concepts_list.name: u
concepts_list.justification: The unknown temperature field. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for temperature.

concepts_list.name: f
concepts_list.justification: Representing the heat source term in the heat equation. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Common notation for heat source.

concepts_list.name: q_bar
concepts_list.justification: Representing the prescribed heat flux on the boundary. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for heat flux.

concepts_list.name: V
concepts_list.justification: Represents a function space used for approximation. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Common notation for function spaces.

concepts_list.name: Gamma_t
concepts_list.description: Boundary Gamma for heat flux specification
concepts_list.justification: Specific boundary where heat flux is prescribed. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Refers to the boundary where q_bar is defined.

new_concept_info.description:
Main computational domain
JUSTIFICATION:
Appears as Ω in the definition of the domain. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: It's the fundamental region of interest.

Differential of the domain Ω
JUSTIFICATION:
Appears as dΩ in integrals, representing an infinitesimal volume element. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for integration.

Test function in the weak formulation
JUSTIFICATION:
Used as test functions in the variational formulation of the problem. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation in finite element methods.

Thermal conductivity
JUSTIFICATION:
Defined as the thermal conductivity. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for thermal conductivity.

Temperature field
JUSTIFICATION:
The unknown temperature field. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for temperature.

Heat source
JUSTIFICATION:
Representing the heat source term in the heat equation. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Common notation for heat source.

Prescribed heat flux
JUSTIFICATION:
Representing the prescribed heat flux on the boundary. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Standard notation for heat flux.

Function space
JUSTIFICATION:
Represents a function space used for approximation. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Common notation for function spaces.

Boundary Gamma for heat flux specification
JUSTIFICATION:
Specific boundary where heat flux is prescribed. NON-EXPLICIT REASONING: Refers to the boundary where q_bar is defined.
